Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

James G. Higgins; Dunn & Panagotacos LLP; 415-982-2100; appearing on behalf of petitioner 200 Kansas Owner LLC.
John M. Magliery; Davis Wright Tremaine LLP; 212-489-8230; appearing on behalf of respondent keenwawa, inc. dba Brightloom.
Marcy Blattner Micale; Davis Wright Tremaine LLP; 213-633-6800; appearing on behalf of respondent keenwawa, inc. dba Brightloom.

Court reporter: Sandra Sotelo, CSR #13584, calendar-la@veritext.com, 866-299-5127.

Respondent contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is GRANTED. Arbitration Award is confirmed.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Sandra Sotelo, CSR #13584, calendar-la@veritext.com, 866-299-5127. (D501)

Respondent?S Motion To Enter Judgment On The Reference
Off Calendar Sep-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

James G. Higgins; Dunn & Panagotacos LLP; 415-982-2100; appearing on behalf of petitioner 200 Kansas Owner LLC.
John M. Magliery; Davis Wright Tremaine LLP; 212-489-8230; appearing on behalf of respondent keenwawa, inc. dba Brightloom.
Marcy Blattner Micale; Davis Wright Tremaine LLP; 213-633-6800; appearing on behalf of respondent keenwawa, inc. dba Brightloom.

Court reporter: Sandra Sotelo, CSR #13584, calendar-la@veritext.com, 866-299-5127.

Respondent contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT ON THE REFERENCE is DENIED. No judicial reference proceedings have been initiated per CCP 638, CCP 639 or Nat'l Union Fire Ins. Co. v. Nationwide Ins. Co. (1999). 69 Cal. App. 4th 709. Parties participated in arbitration availing themselves of the benefits of such proceedings without objection.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Sandra Sotelo, CSR #13584, calendar-la@veritext.com, 866-299-5127. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-26-2022 Continued To Sep-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Higgns and Ryan Dunn (via Zoom) for Plaintiff 200 Kansas Owner LLC.
John Magliery and Marcy Micale (via Zoom) for Defendant Keenwawa, Inc.
Melanie Haynes (925-381-9273), CSR #6995, meljhaynes@comcast.net, Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: language, arbitration, and trial. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is (1) continued to September 22, 2022; (2) respondent has a leave to file a motion/petition to correct arbitration award and set it for hearing on September 22, 2022. Motion/petition to be filed and served no later than September 2, 2022 with response due on September 9. Judge: VJ Harry Jacobs, Clerk: A. Pascual, Melanie Haynes (925-381-9273), CSR #6995, meljhaynes@comcast.net, Court reporter. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Continued To Aug-26-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James Higgins and Ryan Dunn (via Zoom) for Plaintiff 200 Kansas Owner LLC.
John Magliery (via Zoom) for Defendant Keenwawa, Inc.
Elizabeth Wood (925-685-6222), CSR #5134 Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: appeal and clarification. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is continued to August 26, 2022. Parties to file a joint declaration regarding the status of appeal including the date the appeal was filed/is to be timely filed; and if filed, the status of the proceedings. Briefs not to exceed 2 pages to be filed no later than August 24, 2022 by noon. Judge: VJ HARRY JACOBS, Clerk: A. Pascual, Elizabeth Wood (925-685-6222), CSR #5134 Court reporter. (D501)
